message:
🐛 Fix AI summary WebSocket payload and auto-match resolutions (#619)

Fixes:
- Use 'prompt' field instead of 'content' for WebSocket payload
- Add sessionId to prevent "Prompt cannot be empty" error

Enhancements:
- Auto-match resolutions for ALL mission types (except deploy/upgrade)
- Store matched resolutions on mission object for tracking
- Show system message when resolutions are auto-matched:
  "Found X similar resolutions from your knowledge base"
- Display match percentage and source (personal/team)

This makes resolution matching automatic and visible to users,
helping them understand that past knowledge is being leveraged.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
